changes: GitHub Copilot UI authentication — authenticate once from the web UI, credentials are stored server-side and can be injected into any container with one click
Auto-inject setting — new containers automatically receive stored Copilot credentials on creation
Per-session Copilot controls — inject or remove credentials from individual containers via session cards
Version badge in web UI — click the version number (bottom right) to view the full changelog
GitHub Copilot provider support — added to opencode.jsonc enabled providers
GitHub Copilot authentication guide added to documentation (manual docker exec flow)
GitHub Copilot provider and auth documentation
Session persistence — OpenCode conversation history survives container recreations via named Docker volumes
Global and per-session bind-mount mappings with automatic container recreation
Folder browser — server-side directory picker remembers last path
DOM-diffing session list — cards update in-place without flickering
Windows CRLF fix for entrypoint.sh — LF line endings enforced via .gitattributes and Dockerfile sed strip
soc.cmd execution policy fix — -ExecutionPolicy Bypass added for fresh Windows 11 machines
